prevalence.trend: stable due to improved H. pylori eradication programs

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Endoscopy with biopsy for H. pylori, clinical symptoms

publicHealthSystem.screeningCoverage: H. pylori testing available via SUS

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: FBG guidelines, endoscopy when available, H. pylori testing
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: PPIs + triple therapy (clarithromycin, amoxicillin) for H. pylori eradication via SUS
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: High H. pylori prevalence (50-70%), NSAID overuse, limited endoscopy access
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Free H. pylori treatment via SUS, PPIs widely available
